description_long: This is a dark-colored, classic pork pie hat with a short, flat-topped crown and a narrow, flat brim that encircles the base. The crown is cylindrical and sits evenly above the brim, giving the hat a compact and structured appearance. The brim is slightly upturned at the edges, typical of pork pie hats, and appears to be of uniform width all around. The surface of the hat is smooth and matte, suggesting it is made from felt or wool, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The hat is solid in color, with no visible patterns, logos, or bands. Its proportions and style make it suitable for urban fashion, blending both casual and semi-formal aesthetics.
description: A dark, smooth pork pie hat with a flat-topped crown and a narrow, upturned brim, made from felt or wool and lacking any visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat-topped crown and the even, narrow brim encircling the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical crown and the consistent width of the upturned brim.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the flat crown and the uniform brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cylindrical crown and the narrow, upturned brim.
